title: DNS Failed Diagnosis
description: Analyze common reasons for DNS resolution failure for a given domain.
msg_no_ns: No NS records found. Domain might not be delegated or registered.
msg_no_soa: No SOA record. Domain does not exist (NXDOMAIN) or is invalid.
conclusion_ok: DNS configuration appears to be mostly OK. The domain resolves.
conclusion_nxdomain: The domain does not exist (NXDOMAIN) or is not registered.
conclusion_no_ips: The domain is registered but has no IP addresses attached (No A or AAAA records).
conclusion_error: Failed to diagnose domain. Could be a network issue or server timeout.
